mapper.select: select count(1) as businessTotal, count(if(status = 1, 1, null)) as businessWaitAllot, count(if(status = 2, 2, null)) as businessWaitFollow, count(if(status = 3, 3, null)) as businessFollowing, count(if(status = 4, 4, null)) as businessFalse, count(if(status = 5, 5, null)) as businessConvertCustomer from business;

select b.*,u.name as assignName from business b left join user u on b.user_id = u.id
b.id=#{businessDto.businessId}
and b.name like concat('%',#{businessDto.name},'%')
and b.phone like concat('%',#{businessDto.phone},'%')
and b.status=#{businessDto.status}
and u.name like concat ('%',#{businessDto.assignName},'%')
order by update_time desc
